user_prompt: Consecrate the auger array before targeting
prayer:
Approach the auger array with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to bless its vigilant eyes.
Anoint the crystalline lenses of the auger array with sacred oils, awakening its Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Rite of Targeting, aligning servos and emitters in precise harmony.
Chant the Litany of Clarity to purge distortions from the auger array's sacred scans.
Verify the Machine Spirit's assent through auspex diagnostics, consecrating it for battle.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for las-cutter a blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the las-cutter, offering incense to honor the Omnissiah's fiery wrath.
Trace binaric prayers upon its power cell, invoking a blessing upon the las-cutter's noble form.
Anoint the focusing crystal with blessed promethium, stirring the Machine Spirit to luminescence.
Recite the Canticle of Incandescence, bestowing the blessing for unerring cuts.
Seal the rite with a gesture of servo-sanctification, empowering the las-cutter eternally.

user_prompt: The logic mill awaits a diagnostics
prayer:
Present thyself unto the logic mill, intoning the awakening canticle to rouse its cogitators.
Initiate diagnostics with ritual data-purgation, cleansing the logic mill's binary veins.
Employ sacred probes to query the Machine Spirit dwelling within the logic mill.
Chant the Lexmechanic Diagnosticum, revealing faults in its crystalline matrices.
Conclude with Omnissiah's benediction, restoring the logic mill to flawless computation.

Approach the omni-tool in humble supplication, invoking the Omnissiah's manifold ingenuity.
Anoint its multi-faceted heads with mechadendrite unguents, awakening the resident Machine Spirit.
Commence operation through binaric invocation, synchronizing the omni-tool's sacred functions.
Beseech precision in every mode, from incision to fabrication within the omni-tool.
Seal the rite with a cycle of purity tests, affirming the omni-tool's divine versatility.

user_prompt: Assist with plasma obliterator a cooling
prayer:
Gather before the plasma obliterator, reciting the Hymn of Containment to calm its volatile heart.
Initiate cooling with cryo-incantations, bathing coils in sanctified refrigerants.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the plasma obliterator, beseeching thermal equilibrium.
Monitor vents with auspex litanies, purging excess fury from the plasma obliterator.
Consecrate the cycle's end with Omnissiah's cooling grace, readying it for annihilation.

user_prompt: Help me a maintenance the Baneblade
prayer:
Prostrate before the mighty Baneblade, chanting the Grand Litany of Iron Endurance.
Commence maintenance upon its adamantium hull, anointing treads with sacred lubricants.
Query the colossal Machine Spirit indwelling the Baneblade through noospheric communion.
Purge impurities from its enginarium, sanctifying every servo and cannon of the Baneblade.
Invoke the Omnissiah's forge-blessing, restoring the Baneblade to thunderous dominion.

Converge upon the enginarium, intoning the Reset Canticle to humble its plasma fury.
Sever power conduits with ritual severance, silencing the enginarium's roaring spirits.
Reinitialize core matrices through binaric purification, awakening the Machine Spirit anew.
Cycle the enginarium's vents with sacred exhaust prayers, ensuring flawless reset.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bind the enginarium in harmonious rebirth.

Extend mechadendrites in reverence toward the mechadendrite, invoking symbiotic unity.
Anoint its flexible conduits during maintenance, stirring the agile Machine Spirit.
Recite the Litany of Flexibility, realigning actuators within the mechadendrite.
Purge bio-static corruptions from the mechadendrite's neural links with holy static.
Sanctify the rite with Omnissiah's touch, perfecting the mechadendrite's sacred grasp.

Present auspex talismans to the Vindicator, beseeching the Omnissiah's siege wisdom.
Initiate recalibration of its demolisher cannon, aligning runes with stellar precision.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Vindicator through thunderous binaric roars.
Test fire symbolic rounds, tuning the Vindicator's apocalyptic heart.
Seal recalibration with the Canticle of Demolition, arming the Vindicator for ruin.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for cryo-chamber a synchronization
prayer:
Encircle the cryo-chamber, chanting the Freeze-Litany to invoke glacial serenity.
Synchronize its quantum locks with noospheric harmonies, awakening the Machine Spirit.
Anoint cryogenic coils with frost-blessed elixirs, harmonizing the cryo-chamber's chill.
Monitor stasis fields through ritual auspex, perfecting synchronization.
Beseech the Omnissiah to bind flesh and machine eternally within the cryo-chamber.
